boundary: Clean-room public feature parity only. Excludes decompilation, private API probing, auth bypass, copying protected internals, or using non-public source.

sources.summary: Public home page describes Diva as a Discord music bot with YouTube, Spotify, Apple Music, web dashboard, button controls, song request channel, smart queue management, filters, playlists, and broad source support.
Public commands page lists music playback, queue, DJ/admin settings, webplayer, song request setup, playlist, profile, premium, and audio filter commands.
Public guide says commands use slash prefix examples such as /play, /queue, /skip, and documents premium/custom bot setup paths.
Public terms describe Diva as a user-controlled utility that retrieves publicly available third-party media on request and does not retain media after delivery.

implementation_policy.filters: Do not expose arbitrary public audio filter commands in LOKI v1. Equalizer presets are allowed through the mixer/EQ surface.
implementation_policy.training: Use redacted public-channel memory/RAG; do not fine-tune on raw Discord content.
implementation_policy.admin_actions: Discord settings, activity creation, and NPC configuration mutations require server-side permission checks.
